blockers.description: Chart form UI does not match DesignOS design — needs full rebuild before verification can proceed

human_actions_pending.action: Rebuild chart form to match DesignOS design
human_actions_pending.context: Current form was auto-generated and ignores the designed sub-components (GenrePicker pills, StitchCountFields, PatternTypeFields radio buttons, StartPreferenceFields, CoverImageUpload drop zone, dropdown presets for Bin/App)

human_actions_pending.action: Test full chart lifecycle in browser after rebuild
human_actions_pending.context: DB is connected, migration applied, dev server running on port 3000

decisions.decision: Lazy Prisma proxy in db.ts to prevent build-time throw when DATABASE_URL not set
decisions.rationale: Allows build to succeed in CI/dev without database connection
dotenv default is .env, but Next.js convention is .env.local

decisions.decision: CLAUDE.md modularized — tech stack and design context moved to docs/
decisions.rationale: 613 lines was too long for agents to reliably read; reference material separated from rules

decisions.decision: DesignOS enforcement added — guardrail, DESIGN-REFERENCE.md, read_first requirement
decisions.rationale: Phase 2 auto-generated form ignored user's design work; three-layer enforcement prevents recurrence

next_action: 1) Rebuild chart form from DesignOS design (ChartAddForm.tsx + FormFields.tsx). 2) Test chart lifecycle. 3) Complete 02-05 checkpoint.
context_notes: DB is connected and migrated. Dev server on port 3000. Chart form exists at /charts/new but UI doesn't match designs — needs rebuild using product-plan/sections/project-management/ as spec. Key design files: ChartAddForm.tsx (page layout), FormFields.tsx (sub-components: SearchableSelect, GenrePicker, CoverImageUpload, StitchCountFields, PatternTypeFields, StartPreferenceFields).
